message: Hi S1. Happy to trade if we can find a fair price. I'm willing to meet around the middle of the range. Let's aim for steady deals both rounds — mutual low-risk splits beat no-trade rounds for
I will ask 80. My cost is 61, so I need at least 61.
I'll ask 68, meeting you halfway.
If your cost is truly 61, let's split surplus fairly. I'll bid 70 if you ask 72 — midpoint 71 gives you +10, me a reasonable margin. Otherwise no trade wastes both our rounds.
Deal. I'll ask 70. You bid 72 and we trade at 71.
